svg.style: left: 0px; top: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block; min-width: 945px; min-height: 823px;

div.div:
Device connects with claim certificate to
AWS IoT Core @ provision.blackbird.online
Device publishes uuid and signature to "endpoint"

Provision service publishes iotDataEndpoint
and iotCredentialsEndpoint to "endpoint/accepted"

Device connects with claim certificate to
AWS IoT Core @ iotDataEndpoint

Device publishes {} to
"$aws/certificates/create/json"

Fleet Provisioning service creates new
certificate and private key signed with
AWS CA

Fleet Provisioning service publishes certificate,
private key and certificate ownership token to
"$aws/certificates/created/json/accepted"

Device writes unique
private key and certificate
to secure storage
Blackbird specific cloud routing
Standard AWS Fleet Provisioning by claim
Device
Blackbird Clouds
AWS IoT Core
provision.blackbird.online
AWS IoT Core

Device publishes uuid, signature, parameters and
certificate ownership token to
"$aws/provisioning-templates/{template-
name}/provision/json"

Fleet Provisioning service validates device
and creates IoT thing, policies
and activates the certificate

Device applies new
configuration

Fleet Provisioning service publishes device-
specific configuration to
"$aws/provisioning-templates/{template-
name}/provision/json/accepted"

Device connects with unique private key,
certificate and configuration to
AWS IoT Core @ iotDataEndpoint
